creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
This WcolEpre(wcol) ports is new ports.
This is www category ports.

WcolEpre is a prefetching proxy server for WWW.
WcolE is 5th generation of Wcol.
Informaion of Wcol is published by SHiKA project server.
http://shika.aist-nara.ac.jp/products/wcol/wcol.html

This software is beta('pre') version.
But this is an useful software for WWW.

Thanks.

--- shige
